top_signals.title: Corruption cases, investibility warnings, fiscal woes: Indonesia continues to test investors
top_signals.summary: This comes amid a high-profile corruption sentencing and an MSCI warning Indonesia could be downgraded to frontier-market status.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan adds new mobile phone number prefix amid expected shortage
top_signals.summary: The addition of the 060 prefix — in addition to the existing 090, 080 and 070 — will increase total cell phone numbers from 270 million to 360 million.

top_signals.title: Six of the best: rikishi of note in each sumo division
top_signals.summary: The latest banzuke offers more than just top-tier intrigue, with the July meet set to feature standout stories in every division of professional sumo.
